Clara · Sonic identity

Clara has a sound.

Eight ringtones, built from nothing. Warm enough to live with, sharp enough that you never miss a call. Press play.

Make Phone Great · July 2026

Hello · the default

The brief

For the trades and small teams Clara answers for, a ringing phone is money and a missed call is a lost job. So these tones have one job with two halves: cut through a loud van or a busy shop, and still be something you would happily hear twenty times a day. Not music to relax to. Not an alarm you come to dread. A call worth answering.

What shaped them

Motion makes the ring

The memorable tones never sit still: four to nine notes a second. Pause to breathe and it turns into a notification chime, not a call.

Steal the mechanism, not the melody

We took apart the tones people already know (Nokia, the old Apple marimba, the Slack call sounds) and kept what makes them work, not their notes.

Urgent, never alarming

The loud ones cut through with brightness and pace, not harshness. An alarm you would silence forever is a failed alarm.

Named for how they feel

Clara's voices are people: Grace, Connor, Rae. So the ringtones are moods instead: Hush, Sway, Pulse.

The eight

In picker order, each set next to something different so nothing blurs as you scroll. Tap any one to hear it loop.

01

HelloDefault

A bright three-note hook with a rising lift. The Clara signature.

02

Hush

Soft felt piano. Calm, for quiet places.

03

Ping

Bright and insistent. Cuts through a noisy room.

04

Sway

A warm, woody roll. Gentle and full of character.

05

Rush

Fast and driving. Impossible to miss.

06

Cascade

Notes tumbling down, then answering back up.

07

Pulse

Warm and urgent. Easy on the ear.

08

Sunrise

An optimistic climb. Bright morning energy.

Loudness-matched and loop-perfect, so switching between them never jumps in volume and each rings forever without a seam.

The rest of the call

A ringtone is only the first sound of a call. Two more finish the picture: the note Clara plays when a call ends, and the music a caller hears while they wait.

End of callOne-shot

A soft two-note marimba fall to a settled low note. Plays on your phone the moment a call wraps up.

Hold · VibesLoops

A recurring vibraphone line over soft keys. Something easy to wait to.

Hold · GrooveLoops

Soft Rhodes, a brushed shuffle, warm bass. A little more movement.

The hold beds are mixed to sit quietly under a voice, so they play a little louder here than they will on a live call. Both loop without a seam.

Hello is the default. Everything here ships as loop-ready masters, ready to drop into the app: eight ringtones, the end-call note, and the hold music.

8 ringtones · end-call · 2 hold beds · WAV · MP3 · CAF (iOS) · OGG (Android)
